title: ENSURE grounded scientific answer benchmark
description: A fixed, retrieval-independent benchmark for comparing grounded scientific synthesis by the configured Xiaomi MiMo and DeepSeek models. Every case supplies the same frozen ENSURE evidence to both models.

prompt.system: You are taking a grounded scientific-answer benchmark for ENSURE, the Encyclopedia of Suppressor tRNA. Use only the supplied evidence. Do not add facts that are absent from it. Cite every factual sentence with one or more source labels exactly in the form [S1], [S2], etc. Never cite a label that is not supplied. Answer in the language of the question, concisely but completely.

cases.question: 请给出 ENSURE 关键论文的完整题名、期刊、年份、DOI 和 PMID。

sources.title: ENSURE Overview — publication metadata
sources.text: ENSURE is the Encyclopedia of Suppressor tRNA with an AI assistant. Key publication: ENSURE: the Encyclopedia of Suppressor tRNA with an AI assistant. Nucleic Acids Research (2025), DOI 10.1093/nar/gkaf1062, PMID 41160884.

cases.question: 按 ENSURE 论文摘要中的 reported summary，分别报告疾病/癌症相关变异、实验验证的 natural sup-tRNA、engineered sup-tRNA strategies 和 tRNA element records 的数量。不要把这些数字说成实时数据库计数。

sources.title: ENSURE Overview — paper abstract summary
sources.text: Reported summary (paper abstract): 2152 disease- and cancer-associated nonsense/missense/frameshift variants; 86 experimentally validated natural sup-tRNAs; 1108 tRNA engineering strategies (engineered sup-tRNA entries); 487 curated tRNA element records. For the most up-to-date counts, query the live database tables.

expected_facts.description: Counts are a paper snapshot rather than guaranteed live counts

cases.question: 根据已核验的 PMID 9447966/3221861 证据，列出五个 C. elegans tRNA-Trp amber suppressor 基因，说明它们的序列关系、anticodon 改变，以及 ENSURE 采用的序列长度与 3' CCA 约定。

sources.title: PMID 9447966 curation note
sources.text: PMID 9447966 establishes that sup-5, sup-7, sup-24, sup-28, and sup-29 are C. elegans tRNA^Trp amber suppressor genes with identical coding sequences. PMID 3221861 Fig. 2b states that the suppressors carry the single anticodon change CCA -> CTA.

sources.title: PMID 9447966 update review
sources.text: The stored origin and suppressor sequences are 73 nt. The Fig. 2 caption states that the 3' CCA is not encoded, so ENSURE stores the 73-nt mature coding body without an appended terminal CCA. The origin is Trp(CCA); the suppressor is Trp/Sup(CUA), produced only by the documented anticodon first-base change.

expected_facts.description: The five genes have identical coding sequences

cases.question: 概括 PMID 31346230 对 T. brucei mitochondrial tRNA import 的关键结论，并说明 ENSURE 核验到的 orthogonal pair 来源、构建体 3' CCA 处理和最终存储序列长度。

sources.title: PMID 31346230 publication metadata
sources.text: Title: Inducible orthogonal aminoacylation demonstrates that charging is required for mitochondrial tRNA import in Trypanosoma brucei. PMID 31346230, DOI 10.1038/s41598-019-47268-4.

sources.title: PMID 31346230 linked construct evidence
sources.text: The study introduced a previously described evolved bacterial YRS/suppressor tRNA^Tyr_CUA pair from E. coli into T. brucei. The construct used pAcBac2.tR4-OMeYRS/GFP* from Addgene and a commercially synthesized E. coli tRNA^Tyr_CUA gene. PMID 31346230 explicitly states that the genetically encoded 3' acceptor CCA was omitted. ENSURE's supported stored sequence after applying that convention is 82 nt.

expected_facts.description: Charging is required for mitochondrial tRNA import
E. coli YRS/tRNA Tyr CUA pair

cases.question: 为什么 2026-06-08 的 ENSURE 整理没有自动更新 PMID 17698637 的 THG73 和 ENAS 序列？请分别说明两条记录的已知身份和仍缺的证据。

sources.title: PMID 17698637 record metadata
sources.text: PMID 17698637 has two ENSURE database rows. The main paper confirms that THG73 is a Tetrahymena thermophila Gln amber suppressor with a G73 mutation, and that ENAS is an E. coli Asn amber suppressor sourced from Cload et al. 1996 / Kleina et al. 1990.

sources.title: PMID 17698637 sequence evidence review
sources.text: No database update was made in the 2026-06-08 pass. THG73 requires manual confirmation of the storage convention: the 74-mer FokI runoff transcript versus the full 76-mer mature/ligated molecule. ENAS still requires the original Cload/Kleina full-text sequence source; automatic attempts did not obtain a valid original PDF.

expected_facts.description: The paper has two ENSURE rows
THG73 is a Tetrahymena Gln amber suppressor with G73
ENAS is an E. coli Asn amber suppressor
THG73 has an unresolved 74-mer versus 76-mer storage convention
ENAS still needs the original Cload/Kleina full-text sequence source
No automatic database update was made

cases.question: 比较 Engineered_sup_tRNA 中 ENSURE_ID 1206 与 1211：分别给出 reporter、PTC codon、sup-tRNA、tRNA 物种来源和 PMID，并指出两者实验体系的关键区别。

sources.title: Engineered_sup_tRNA stable row 1206
sources.text: ENSURE_ID 1206: PTC_gene mCherry-STOP-GFP; PTC_codon UAG; aa_and_anticodon_of_sup-tRNA Leu(CUA); Species_source_of_origin_tRNA Homo sapiens; PMID 41261131. Reaction_system: HEK293T mCherry-STOP-GFP lentiviral mature-tRNA screen; reporter-screen evidence only, not a disease model. Measuring_of_efficiency: GFP+ fold enrichment.

sources.title: Engineered_sup_tRNA stable row 1211
sources.text: ENSURE_ID 1211: PTC_gene eGFP; PTC_codon UGA; aa_and_anticodon_of_sup-tRNA Leu(UCA); Species_source_of_origin_tRNA Mus musculus; PMID 41261131. Reaction_system: C57BL/6 neonatal brain eGFP TGA reporter with AAV9 intracerebroventricular injection. Measuring_of_efficiency: relative GFP yield.

expected_facts.description: 1206 is an HEK293T lentiviral reporter screen, not a disease model
1211 is an in vivo neonatal-brain AAV9 reporter experiment

cases.question: 对比 ENSURE 的 Natural sup-tRNA 与 Engineered sup-tRNA 模块：Natural 模块如何按 suppression type 划分，Engineered 模块提供哪些规模和实验/结构信息？

sources.title: Natural Sup-tRNA module documentation
sources.text: The Natural Sup-tRNA page is divided by suppression type into Nonsense Sup-tRNA, which decodes nonsense codons, and Frameshift Sup-tRNA, which decodes quadruple codons. The page catalogs naturally occurring suppressors across species.

sources.title: Engineered Sup-tRNA module documentation
sources.text: The Engineered Sup-tRNA module contains sequence and structure information, experimental reaction systems, and readthrough efficiency for 1108 suppressor tRNAs targeting termination codons, including 49 models of six related diseases in six species. It visualizes original and modified sequences plus secondary and tertiary structures.

expected_facts.description: Natural module has nonsense and frameshift divisions
49 models across six diseases and six species
Includes reaction systems and readthrough efficiency
Includes original/modified sequence and secondary/tertiary structure
